title: Perimeter of a rectangle
problem: Find the perimeter of a rectangle with length $11$ cm and width $4$ cm.

steps.instruction: Recall the perimeter formula for a rectangle.
Add the values inside the brackets.

title: Perimeter of a composite shape
problem: A composite L-shaped figure has sides measuring $7$ m, $4$ m, $3$ m, $2$ m, $4$ m and $2$ m. Find the perimeter.

steps.instruction: The perimeter of any shape is the total distance around the outside. List all the side lengths.
Add all the side lengths together.

title: Finding a missing side given perimeter
problem: A rectangle has a perimeter of $34$ cm. Its length is $5$ cm more than its width. Find the width.

steps.instruction: Define the unknown. Let the width be $w$ cm. Write an expression for the length.
Write the perimeter formula and substitute.
